title: membership — published macros
description: No request-level macros — membership context is resolved via route bindings. One Blueprint macro shared with sibling finance modules for the snapshot column family.

blueprint_macros.name: Blueprint::couponAndTaxSnapshots
blueprint_macros.adds: Adds the shared column family for coupon + tax snapshots used across finance aggregates: `coupon_id` (uuid nullable + FK to coupons + RESTRICT), `coupon_snapshot` (jsonb nullable), `tax_calculation_id` (uuid nullable + FK to tax_calculations + RESTRICT), `tax_calculation_snapshot` (jsonb nullable). Used by memberships + (Wave 4.5+) invoices + one-off transactions.
columns: coupon_id: uuid NULL FK coupons RESTRICT
tax_calculation_id: uuid NULL FK tax_calculations RESTRICT

blueprint_macros.name: Blueprint::passLifecycleTimestamps
blueprint_macros.adds: Adds valid_from + valid_until + consumed_at + refunded_at columns + related indexes for the standard pass-lifecycle shape. Reserved for future pass-family expansions (session_credits, tournament_entries) that share the shape.
